节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides multiple methods for debugging and profiling applications. With these methods, you can obtain memory, CPU, GPU, and GC data, collect process trace and profiler data, and dump VM heap snapshots. Since most APIs of this module are both performance-consuming and time-consuming, and are defined based on the HiDebug module, you are advised to use these APIs only during the application debugging and profiling phases. If the APIs are required in other scenarios, evaluate the impact of the APIs on application performance.
Obtains the total number of bytes occupied by the total space (the sum of uordblks and fordblks obtained from mallinfo) held by a process, which is measured by the memory allocator.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the total number of bytes occupied by the total space.
节点.return_description: Returns the total number of bytes occupied by the total space.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the total number of bytes occupied by the total allocated space (uordblks obtained from mallinfo) held by a process, which is measured by the memory allocator.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the total number of bytes occupied by the total allocated space.
节点.return_description: Returns the total number of bytes occupied by the total allocated space.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the total number of bytes occupied by the total free space (fordblks obtained from mallinfo) held by a process, which is measured by the memory allocator.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the memory occupied by the free normal blocks held by the process, in bytes.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the memory occupied by the free normal blocks held by the process, in bytes.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the virtual set size used by the application process. This API is implemented by multiplying the value of size (number of memory pages) in the /proc/{pid}/statm node by the page size (4 KB per page).
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the virtual set size used by the application process, in KB.
节点.return_description: Returns the virtual set size used by the application process, in KB.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the physical memory actually used by the application process. This API is implemented by summing up the values of **Pss** and **SwapPss** in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup** node.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the physical memory actually used by the application process, in KB.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the physical memory actually used by the application process, in KB.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the shared dirty memory of a process. This API is implemented by reading the value of Shared_Dirty in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the shared dirty memory of the process, in KB.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the shared dirty memory of the process, in KB.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the private dirty memory of a process. This API is implemented by reading the value of Private_Dirty in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the private dirty memory of the process, in KB.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the private dirty memory of the process, in KB.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the CPU usage of a process.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the CPU usage of the process.
节点.return_description: Returns the CPU usage of the process.

节点.功能描述: Starts the VM profiling method. startProfiling(filename: string) and stopProfiling() are called in pairs. startProfiling(filename: string) always occurs before stopProfiling(). You are advised not to call either of these methods repeatedly. Otherwise, an exception may occur. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory. Such as "/data/accounts/account_0/appdata/[package name]/files/cpuprofiler-xxx.json" in the files directory of the application based on the specified file name.
注释信息: @param { string } filename - User-defined file name of the sampling data. The .json file is generated

parameters.说明: User-defined file name of the sampling data. The .json file is generated

节点.功能描述: Stops the VM profiling method. stopProfiling() and startProfiling(filename: string) are called in pairs. startProfiling(filename: string) always occurs before stopProfiling(). You are advised not to call either of these methods repeatedly. Otherwise, an exception may occur. It takes effect only when the CPU profiler is turned on.

Exports the VM heap data and generates a filename.heapsnapshot file. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory. Such as "/data/accounts/account_0/appdata/[package name]/files/xxx.heapsnapshot".
注释信息: @param { string } filename - Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.

parameters.说明: Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.

节点.功能描述: Starts the VM profiling method. startJsCpuProfiling(filename: string) and stopJsCpuProfiling() are called in pairs. startJsCpuProfiling(filename: string) always occurs before stopJsCpuProfiling(). You are advised not to call either of these methods repeatedly. Otherwise, an exception may occur. directory of the application based on the specified file name.
注释信息: @param { string } filename - User-defined heap file name. The .heapsnapshot file is generated in the files
@throws {BusinessError} 401 - the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

parameters.说明: User-defined heap file name. The .heapsnapshot file is generated in the files

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

节点.功能描述: Stops the VM profiling method. stopJsCpuProfiling() and startJsCpuProfiling(filename: string) are called in pairs. startJsCpuProfiling() always occurs before stopJsCpuProfiling(). You are advised not to call either of these methods repeatedly. Otherwise, an exception may occur. It takes effect only when the CPU profiler is turned on

Exports the heap data. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory. in the files directory of the application based on the specified file name.
注释信息: @param { string } filename - User-defined file name of the sampling data. The .heapsnapshot file is generated
@throws {BusinessError} 401 - the parameter check failed, Parameter type error.

parameters.说明: User-defined file name of the sampling data. The .heapsnapshot file is generated

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed, Parameter type error.

节点.功能描述: Obtains system service information. It need dump permission. This API can be called only by system application. 1.the parameter type error 2.the args parameter is not string array.
注释信息: @param { number } serviceid - Obtains the system service information based on the specified service ID.
@param { number } fd - File descriptor to which data is written by the API.
@param { Array<string> } args - Parameter list of the Dump API of the system service.
@throws {BusinessError} 11400101 - ServiceId invalid. The system ability does not exist.

parameters.说明: Obtains the system service information based on the specified service ID.
File descriptor to which data is written by the API.
Parameter list of the Dump API of the system service.

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed,Possible causes:
ServiceId invalid. The system ability does not exist.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the CPU usage of the system.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the CPU usage of the system.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - The status of the system CPU usage is abnormal.
节点.return_description: Returns the CPU usage of the system.

error_codes.description: The status of the system CPU usage is abnormal.

节点.功能描述: Describes the CPU usage of a thread.
Thread id
CPU usage of the thread.
Obtains the CPU usage of application threads.
注释信息: @returns { ThreadCpuUsage[] } Returns the CPU usage of all threads of the current application process.
节点.return_description: Returns the CPU usage of all threads of the current application process.

节点.功能描述: Describes the system memory information, including the total memory, free memory, and available memory.
Total memory of the system, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of MemTotal in the /proc/meminfo node.
Free memory of the system, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of MemFree in the /proc/meminfo node.
Available memory of the system, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of MemAvailable in the /proc/meminfo node.
Obtains system memory information. This API is implemented by reading data from the /proc/meminfo node.
注释信息: @returns { SystemMemInfo } Returns the system memory information.
节点.return_description: Returns the system memory information.

节点.功能描述: Describes memory information of the application process.

Size of the occupied physical memory (including the proportionally allocated memory occupied by the shared library), in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by summing up the values of Pss and SwapPss in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.

Size of the occupied virtual memory (including the memory occupied by the shared library), in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by multiplying the value of size (number of memory pages) in the /proc/{pid}/statm node by the page size (4 KB per page).

Size of the occupied physical memory (including the memory occupied by the shared library), in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of Rss in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
Size of the shared dirty memory, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of Shared_Dirty in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
Size of the private dirty memory, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of Private_Dirty in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
Size of the shared clean memory, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of Shared_Clean in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
Size of the private clean memory, in KB. The value of this parameter is obtained by reading the value of Private_Clean in the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup node.
Obtains the memory information of the application process. This API is implemented by reading data from the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup and /proc/{pid}/statm node.
注释信息: @returns { NativeMemInfo } Returns the memory information of the application process.
节点.return_description: Returns the memory information of the application process.

节点.功能描述: Defines the memory limit of the application process.
Limit on the resident set size, in KB.
Limit on the virtual memory size, in KB.
Limit on the JS VM heap size of the calling thread, in KB.
Size limit of the JS heap memory of the process, in KB.
Obtains the memory limit of an application process.
注释信息: @returns { MemoryLimit } Returns the memory limit of the application process.
节点.return_description: Returns the memory limit of the application process.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the memory information of the application process asynchronous. This API is implemented by reading data from the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup and /proc/{pid}/statm node.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<NativeMemInfo> } Returns the memory information of the application process.
节点.return_description: Returns the memory information of the application process.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the memory information of the application process, with optional caching to improve performance. The cached value remains valid for 5 minutes. This API is implemented by reading data from the /proc/{pid}/smaps_rollup and /proc/{pid}/statm node. The default value is false.
注释信息: @param { boolean } [forceRefresh] Whether to retrieve fresh data and immediate refresh the cached value.
@returns { NativeMemInfo } Returns the memory information of the application process.

parameters.说明: boolean } [forceRefresh] Whether to retrieve fresh data and immediate refresh the cached value.

节点.return_description: Returns the memory information of the application process.

节点.功能描述: Describes the VM memory information.
Total heap size of the current VM, in KB.
Heap size used by the current VM, in KB.
Size of all array objects of the current VM, in KB.
Obtains VM memory information.
注释信息: @returns { VMMemoryInfo } Returns the VM memory information.
节点.return_description: Returns the VM memory information.

节点.功能描述: Describes types of trace collection threads, including the main thread and all threads.
The main thread of the application.
All threads of the application.
Enumerates the tags used in trace collection.
Ability Manager tag. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:ability.
ArkUI development framework. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:ace.
JSVM VM. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:ark.
Bluetooth. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:bluetooth.
Common library subsystem. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:commonlibrary.
Distributed hardware device management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:devicemanager.
Distributed audio. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:daudio.
Distributed camera. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:dcamera.
Distributed data management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:distributeddatamgr.
Distributed hardware framework. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:dhfwk.
Distributed input. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:dinput.
Distributed screen. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:dscreen.
Distributed scheduler. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:dsched.
FFRT task. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:ffrt.
File management system. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:filemanagement.
Global resource management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:gresource.
Graphics module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:graphic.
HDF subsystem. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:hdf.
MISC module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:misc.
Multi-modal input module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:multimodalinput.
Network. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:net.
Notification module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:notification.
Nweb. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:nweb.
OHOS. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:ohos.
Power management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:power.
RPC. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:rpc.
System capability management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:samgr.
Window management. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:window.
Audio module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:zaudio.
Camera module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:zcamera.
Image module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:zimage.
Media module. The corresponding HiTrace command is tagName:zmedia.

Starts automatic trace collection in a specified scope. This API is a supplement to the HiTrace module. The performance consumption during trace collection increases with the collection scope. Therefore, before using this API, you are advised to run the hitrace command to capture trace logs and select the key scope of trace collection to improve the API performance. 1.The limit parameter is too small 2.The parameter is not within the enumeration type 3.The parameter type error or parameter order error
注释信息: @param { number[] } tags - Scope for trace collection. For details, see tags.
@param { TraceFlag } flag - For details, see TraceFlag.
@param { number } limitSize - Limit on the trace file size, in bytes. The maximum size of a single file is 500 MB.
@returns { string } Returns the path of the trace file.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400103 - No write permission on the file.

parameters.说明: Scope for trace collection. For details, see tags.
Limit on the trace file size, in bytes. The maximum size of a single file is 500 MB.

节点.return_description: Returns the path of the trace file.

error_codes.description: Invalid argument, Possible causes:
Capture trace already enabled.
No write permission on the file.
Abnormal trace status.

节点.功能描述: Stops application trace collection. Use startAppTraceCapture() to start collection before calling this API. If this API is called before trace collection or it is repeatedly called, an exception will occur.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - The status of the trace is abnormal.

error_codes.description: The status of the trace is abnormal.
No capture trace running.

节点.功能描述: Describes the key-value pair used to store GC statistics. This type does not support multi-thread operations. If this type is operated by multiple threads at the same time in an application, use a lock for it.
Obtains the memory usage of ArkTS objects in the virtual machine.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the memory usage of ArkTS objects, in KB.
节点.return_description: Returns the memory usage of ArkTS objects, in KB.

节点.功能描述: Obtains all system GC statistics.
注释信息: @returns { GcStats } Returns the system GC statistics.
节点.return_description: Returns the system GC statistics.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the specified system GC statistics based on parameters. 1. Invalid parameter, a string parameter required. 2. Invalid parameter, unknown property.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the item of the GC statistics to be obtained.
节点.return_description: Returns the item of the GC statistics to be obtained.

error_codes.description: Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Sets the number of FDs, number of threads, JS memory, or native memory limit of the application. 1.For pss_memory, it means the baseline PSS memory size for the application, system memory control will be triggered if exceed the value too much. 2.For js_heap, it means the percentage of the used JS heap memory to the maximum limit exceed which heap dump will be triggered if enableDebugLog set as true, it can be set between 85 and 95. 3.For fd, it means the maximum fd number can be opened. 4.For thread, it means the maximum thread number can be created. it as true only in gray release because collecting debug log will cost too much cpu or memory. 1.The limit parameter is too small 2.The parameter is not in the specified type 3.The parameter type error or parameter order error
注释信息: @param { string } type - resource type. It could be pss_memory、js_heap、fd、or thread.
@param { number } value - For different resource type, values could have different meaning:
@param { boolean } enableDebugLog - Whether to enable external debug log. Default is false, pls make sure set
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Set limit failed due to remote exception

parameters.说明: resource type. It could be pss_memory、js_heap、fd、or thread.
For different resource type, values could have different meaning:
Whether to enable external debug log. Default is false, pls make sure set

error_codes.description: Invalid argument, Possible causes:
Set limit failed due to remote exception

节点.功能描述: Obtains the debugging state of an application process. If the Ark or native layer of the application process is in debugging state, true is returned. Otherwise, false is returned.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } true if the application is in the debugging state.
节点.return_description: true if the application is in the debugging state.

注释信息: @returns { Promise<number> } Returns the size of the GPU memory, in KB.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the GPU memory, in KB.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the GPU memory synchronously.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the size of the GPU memory, in KB.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the GPU memory, in KB.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.

节点.功能描述: Graphics memory summary.
GL memory
Graph memory

Obtains the size of the GPU memory summary. This API uses a promise to return the result. graphics memory data will be obtained. The interval value range is 2 seconds to 3600 seconds, If interval is an invalid value, the default value is 300 seconds.
注释信息: @param { number } [interval] If the cache of graphics memory is older than interval (unit: second), the latest
@returns { Promise<GraphicsMemorySummary> } Returns the size of the GPU memory summary, in KB.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.

parameters.说明: number } [interval] If the cache of graphics memory is older than interval (unit: second), the latest

节点.return_description: Returns the size of the GPU memory summary, in KB.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.

节点.功能描述: Dumps the original heap snapshot of the VM for the current thread. The API uses a promise to return the path of the .rawheap file. You can use rawheap-translator to convert the generated file into a .heapsnapshot file for parsing. The generated file will be stored in a folder within the application directory. However, since this file is usually large, the system imposes restrictions on the frequency and number of calls to this function. Consequently, you might fail to obtain the dump file due to quota limitations. These failures will persist until the quota is regularly refreshed by the system. Therefore, it is advisable to delete the file immediately after you have finished processing it. Moreover, it is recommended that you use this function in the gray - release version. If this parameter is not specified, GC is triggered before dumping.
注释信息: @param { boolean } needGC - Whether GC is required when a heap snapshot is dumped. The default value is true.
@returns { Promise<string> } Returns the path of the generated snapshot file.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400108 - Failed to wait for the child process to finish.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400109 - Timeout while waiting for the child process to finish.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400110 - Disk remaining space too low.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400113 - Failed to create dump file.

parameters.说明: Whether GC is required when a heap snapshot is dumped. The default value is true.

节点.return_description: Returns the path of the generated snapshot file.

error_codes.description: Quota exceeded.
Fork operation failed.
Failed to wait for the child process to finish.
Timeout while waiting for the child process to finish.
Disk remaining space too low.
Napi interface call exception.
Repeated data dump.
Failed to create dump file.

节点.功能描述: GwpAsan Options.
Control whether to enable GWP-ASan every time
sample rate of GWP-ASAN
the max simutaneous allocations of GWP-ASAN

@param { number } [duration] - The duration days of GWP-ASAN grayscale.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400114 - The number of GWP-ASAN applications of this device overflowed after last boot.

parameters.说明: number } [duration] - The duration days of GWP-ASAN grayscale.

error_codes.description: The number of GWP-ASAN applications of this device overflowed after last boot.

节点.功能描述: Disable the GWP-ASAN grayscale of your application.
Obtain the remaining days of GWP-ASan grayscale for your application.
注释信息: @returns { number } The remaining days of GWP-ASan grayscale.
节点.return_description: The remaining days of GWP-ASan grayscale.

节点.功能描述: Trimming level of raw heap snapshot.
Basic heap snapshot trimming(e.g. reducing content of string object).

On top of level 1 trimming, object address size has been additionally trimmed. Please use latest version of rawheap-translator tool for parsing and converting .rawheap into .heapsnapshot file. Conversion process may fail when legacy tool is utilized. A higher trimming level means a longer time needed to generate the .rawheap file. Ensure that this duration falls below the app freeze threshold.
Sets the raw heap snapshot trimming level for the current process.
注释信息: @param { JsRawHeapTrimLevel } level - The trimming level of raw heap snapshot.

parameters.说明: The trimming level of raw heap snapshot.
